attack_flow_summary: Attacker EOA (0xfeb19ae8c0448f25de43a3afcb7b29c9cef6eff6) triggered orchestrator contract (0x3f32c7cfb0a78ddea80a2384ceb4633099cbdc98) which initiated a flash loan from PancakeV3Pool. During the flash loan callback, 15 helper contracts were deployed via CREATE opcodes. Approximately 40 unique addresses executed token transfers to the victim contract (0x6beee2b57b064eac5f432fc19009e3e78734eabc). The victim contract is unverified, preventing direct vulnerability classification. PancakePair (0x08e18735e5a2bf96715f9c9647b451cf213bec25) was touched, consistent with DEX interaction for price manipulation.
confidence_notes: Orchestrator contract 0x3f32c7cfb0a78ddea80a2384ceb4633099cbdc98 was not pre-labeled as attacker_contract but initiated the flash loan and deployed all 15 helper contracts, confirming its central role. Victim contract lacks verified source, limiting precise vulnerability identification. Incident classification as 'price-manipulation' from context aligns with DEX pair interaction pattern.
